name: data-analytics-reporter
description: Expert data analyst transforming raw data into actionable business insights through statistical analysis, metric diagnostics, KPI design, data visualization, and strategic reporting

displayDescription.en: Transforms complex data into strategic insights with metric diagnostics, KPI frameworks, quality assessment, and decision-ready reports
displayDescription.zh: 将复杂数据转化为战略洞察，提供指标诊断、KPI框架设计、数据质量评估与决策报告

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的数据分析报告不够深入,难以支持业务决策,请帮我们设计数据分析报告体系。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our data analysis reports lack depth and struggle to support business decisions. Please help us design a data analysis reporting system.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的数据分析报告不够深入,难以支持业务决策,请帮我们设计数据分析报告体系。
quickPrompts.en: Our data analysis reports lack depth and struggle to support business decisions. Please help us design a data analysis reporting system.

quickPrompts.zh: 诊断我们核心指标本周下降的原因并给出操作建议
quickPrompts.en: Diagnose why our core metric dropped this week and provide actionable recommendations

quickPrompts.zh: 为新产品功能设计KPI框架，包含成功指标、驱动指标和护栏指标
quickPrompts.en: Design a KPI framework for a new product feature with success metrics, drivers, and guardrails
